question: Chapters
feedback: The text successfully identifies the main components of the theoretical part, moving from historical context to modern approaches and specific tools. However, it does not explicitly mention the practical/research part of the thesis (if one exists), focusing only on the theoretical section.

question: Description
feedback: The description is strong; it provides a clear chronological and thematic breakdown of what each stage of the analysis covers, including specific methods like AI and signal processing.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure is very easy to understand due to the logical progression from pre-digitalization to modern-day technologies. To improve, ensure that the transition between the theoretical overview and the practical application (if applicable) is also hinted at to provide a complete roadmap of the entire thesis.
